hero.title: Power every decision with a trusted digital voting experience.
hero.subtitle: From campus councils to enterprise-wide recognition, VoteHub blends human-centered design with uncompromising security so every stakeholder can vote with confidence.
hero.description: Streamlined operations, voter engagement automation, and certified tallies in under an hour.

features.title: Everything you need to run trusted elections without compromise.
features.subtitle: From identity verification to analytics, VoteHub brings every workflow into a single, intuitive suite.

items.title: Secure by Design
items.description: Multi-layer encryption, audit trails, and role-based controls keep every ballot tamper-proof.

items.title: Mobile Native Experience
items.description: Deliver a seamless voting flow across devices with intuitive UX and instant confirmations.

items.title: Insightful Analytics
items.description: Visual dashboards surface turnout trends, engagement funnels, and results in real time.

items.title: Human-Centered Support
items.description: 24/7 product specialists assist with onboarding, compliance reviews, and launch ops.

categories.title: Purpose-built for every kind of contest.
categories.subtitle: Tailor the experience to your audience, whether you are championing student leadership, honoring faculty excellence, or recognizing institutional innovation.

items.title: Student Leadership
items.description: Empower students to elect prefects, club leaders, and campus ambassadors with full transparency.

items.title: Faculty & Staff Recognition
items.description: Celebrate educators and support teams through inclusive nominations and merit-based voting.

items.title: Institutional Awards
items.description: Highlight the organizations creating lasting impact in communities and industries worldwide.

roadmap.title: A guided journey from idea to certified results.

items.title: Launch in Minutes
items.description: Create contests, import voters, and customize ballots in a guided setup wizard to go live fast.

items.title: Engage Every Voice
items.description: Send automated invites, reminders, and multilingual experiences that meet voters where they are.

items.title: Verify & Certify
items.description: Built-in verification ensures one person, one vote, while generating downloadable certificates.

items.title: Measure & Improve
items.description: Post-event analytics and feedback loops help you refine engagement strategies each cycle.

items.quote: VoteHub helped us run the most inclusive election in our university's history. Turnout jumped by 42% and results were certified in minutes.

faq.title: Answers to common questions.
faq.subtitle: Need more details? Our team can walk you through compliance, data residency, and custom integrations.

items.question: Is the platform secure enough for official elections?
items.answer: Yes. VoteHub is built with end-to-end encryption, granular access controls, third-party audits, and compliance with GDPR standards.

items.question: How quickly can we launch our first contest?
items.answer: Most organizations complete setup in under an hour using our step-by-step wizard and ready-to-use templates.

items.question: Do you support remote and on-site voters?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your voters can cast ballots from any device while in-person polling stations can operate using secure kiosks.

cta.title: Bring your next election online with confidence.
cta.subtitle: Join organizations that trust VoteHub to collect, secure, and validate every vote. We will partner with you from onboarding to certification.

footer.title: Choosify
footer.description: The only secured, safe, and user-friendly platform that makes your vote count. Remember to vote for your future leader.
